name: revit_create_grids
description: Creates structural grids from selected curves, orthogonal spacing, or radial and arc layouts.

curve_ids.description: Model or detail curve ids for selected mode

spacing_feet.description: Grid spacing for orthogonal or radial modes

notes: Invoke CreateWithSelectedCurvesData, CreateOrthogonalGridsData, or CreateRadialAndArcGridsData without forms.
